title: knoxia platycarpa var. hirsuta
intro: Knoxia platycarpa var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy knoxia, is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Knoxia platycarpa var. hirsuta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
